metadata.generatedFor: Smart City Decision Dashboard — Traffic Safety Allocation Module

fineStructure.source_mci: KPMG Kazakhstan Taxation of International Executives 2024. https://assets.kpmg.com/content/dam/kpmg/xx/pdf/2023/01/TIES-Kazakhstan.pdf
fineStructure.weightedAvgNote: 60% speeding avg ~22k + 25% red light 55k + 15% other 13k ≈ 28,000 tenge
fineStructure.collectionRateNote: Conservative estimate for Kazakhstan enforcement reality — marked as T3 estimated
fineStructure.source_speed: Kazakhstan Interior Ministry via Tengrinews, Dec 2025. https://en.tengrinews.kz/autos/no-cameras-are-not-fining-drivers-at-66-km-h-interior-270309/

hardwareCosts.costNote: Derived: ~$18,000 USD mid-range fixed speed camera × 470 tenge/USD. Validated against Adaptive Recognition KZ deployment context.
hardwareCosts.source_hardware: Adaptive Recognition KZ toll road project. https://adaptiverecognition.com/case-study/automated-road-tolling-in-kazakhstan-is-now-a-reality-with-adaptive-recognition-technology/

metadata.survivorshipBiasNote: 2 of 6 zones are UNMONITORED (isMonitored: false). These show null violationsPerMonth because violations are never recorded — not because none occur. The coverage gap and adjacent accident history are the actual risk signals. The AI should flag these as top priority.

intersections.name: Al-Farabi / Dostyk
intersections.notes: Highest volume intersection in the city. Al-Farabi 6-lane meets Dostyk Ave. Camera paying back in 4 months — benchmark case for ROI.

intersections.name: Raiymbek / Seifullin
intersections.notes: Red light violations dominate here — heavy trucks can't stop fast. Industrial zone approach. Elevated accident count relative to traffic volume.

intersections.name: Abay / Auezov
intersections.notes: Lower violation count but elevated pedestrian risk — school nearby inflates severity. Camera here is welfare-justified even if ROI is lower.

intersections.name: Suyunbai / Ring Road
intersections.notes: City entry point. Speeding dominant — drivers arriving from highway still traveling at highway speeds. Camera installed 2022 already generating strong returns.

intersections.name: Rozybakiev / Timiryazev
intersections.violationsNote: NULL because unmonitored — violations occur but are never recorded. This is the survivorship bias signal.
intersections.accidentsNote: Only manually-filed police reports. Real figure likely higher — unmonitored zones have systematic underreporting.
intersections.estimatedViolationsMethod: Interpolated from adjacent camera density (310–390/mo) adjusted for lower traffic volume (8,200 vs 22,000+)

aiFlag.reason: 2.1km unmonitored coverage gap. Absence of violation data is itself the risk signal — not evidence of safety. Adjacent cameras record 310–390 violations/month at higher-volume roads. Accident history of 3/year is floor estimate only.
aiFlag.recommendation: Install fixed speed camera. Projected 3-month ROI breakeven. Closes largest unmonitored gap on the residential collector network.

intersections.name: Al-Farabi / Navoi
intersections.violationsNote: NULL because unmonitored — lies between two high-performing cameras but has no coverage itself.
intersections.accidentsNote: Minimal filed reports — consistent with unmonitored zone underreporting pattern.
intersections.estimatedViolationsMethod: Al-Farabi corridor speed pattern — drivers accelerate between cam_001 and the unmonitored gap. Higher estimate than cam_005 due to arterial speed dynamics.

aiFlag.reason: Highest estimated violation potential of all unmonitored zones. Located on Al-Farabi arterial corridor — drivers use the 1.7km gap between cam_001 and the city boundary as an unchecked speed zone. High-volume road (41k vehicles/day) with zero enforcement presence.
aiFlag.recommendation: Top priority camera install. Highest projected annual revenue (50.9M tenge). Breaks even in ~3 months. Eliminates the Al-Farabi speed corridor gap that drivers currently exploit.

aggregates.aiSummary: Install cameras at Al-Farabi/Navoi and Rozybakiev/Timiryazev → 92M tenge annual additional revenue, 17M tenge total investment, ROI breakeven in 3 months. These zones look safe in current data only because they are unmonitored — the data gap IS the risk.
